packageRules.description: One weekly PR on auto/bump-renovate-deps (branchPrefix + groupSlug); title 'Update dependencies' (groupName). The prefix is scoped so Renovate prunes only its own branches, not the cpp pipeline's auto/bump-cpp-deps.

postUpgradeTasks.description: Refresh MODULE.bazel.lock to track the bazel_dep versions Renovate bumped.
